exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch monitoring

response.content:
graph LR
    participant API_Gateway as "API Gateway"
    participant Lambda as "AWS Lambda"
    participant DynamoDB as "DynamoDB"
    participant S3 as "S3"
    participant CloudWatch as "CloudWatch"
    API_Gateway -->|REST API Request| Lambda
    Lambda -->|CRUD Operations| DynamoDB
    Lambda -->|File Upload/Download| S3
    Lambda -->|Logging & Monitoring| CloudWatch
    CloudWatch -->|Error/Performance Metrics| API_Gateway
    CloudWatch -->|Error/Performance Metrics| Lambda
    DynamoDB -->|Data Storage| Lambda
    S3 -->|File Storage| Lambda
    style API_Gateway fill:#fff,stroke:#000
    style Lambda fill:#fff,stroke:#000
    style DynamoDB fill:#fff,stroke:#000
    style S3 fill:#fff,stroke:#000
    style CloudWatch fill:#fff,stroke:#000
